The '''Asteroid Laser Battery''' was a concealed weapon platform housed on a small [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]].

==Description==
Manufactured by [[Byblos Drive Yards/Legends|Byblos Drive Yards]], no two Asteroid Laser Batteries were the same. Typically, a [[Power generator/Legends|generator]] provided energy for two [[Turbolaser/Legends|turbolaser]] turrets and a robust [[Deflector shield/Legends|shield system]], rated at 200 [[SBD/Legends|SBD]]. No armor reinforcement was necessary, as the tough rock of the asteroid itself provided the equivalent of 95 [[RU/Legends|RU]] hull plating.

==History==
Originally used around mining outposts for defensive purposes, where asteroid debris was common, these platforms provided a strong hidden defense capability wherever they were installed. Many groups used such installations, including [[Pirate/Legends|pirates]], [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] as well as legitimate commercial or scientific concerns, especially in conjunction with the Byblos [[Asteroid Hangar]] and [[Asteroid Warhead Launcher]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''
